assertions.title: Positive stock adjustments and RM adjustments

steps.expected: RECOUNT_UP increases FG stock and posts balanced journal with inventory debit and variance credit
steps.observed: Targeted test suite passed. RECOUNT_UP path raised stock from 4 to 7, movement type ADJUSTMENT_IN with qty 3, and journal lines included INV debit 45.0000 and VAR credit 45.0000.

steps.expected: Raw material adjustment endpoint/service supports stock updates, movement tracking, balanced journals, and idempotent replay protection
steps.observed: RawMaterialAdjustmentServiceTest passed all 4 tests: increase flow posted journal amount 37.5000 with ADJUSTMENT_IN movement and stock 5.00→8.00; decrease flow consumed FIFO batches and remained idempotent on replay; payload mismatch with same idempotency key returned ApplicationException; insufficient batch coverage rejected with no stock mutation.

steps.action: Cross-check implementation wiring for RM adjustment surface
steps.expected: Dedicated raw material adjustment endpoint exists and delegates to adjustment service path
steps.observed: RawMaterialController exposes POST /api/v1/inventory/raw-materials/adjustments and returns 'Raw material adjustment posted' with RawMaterialService.adjustStock(..), matching dedicated adjustment surface required by the assertion.

evidence.output: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 8, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0 for the two targeted classes.

assertions.title: Batch expiry monitoring and negative stock prevention

steps.action: Run InventoryBatchQueryServiceTest for expiring-soon window behavior
steps.expected: Expiring-soon query returns only batches within window and sorts combined RM/FG results
steps.observed: InventoryBatchQueryServiceTest passed: listExpiringSoonBatches(30) returned exactly RM-NEAR-A, FG-NEAR, RM-NEAR-B (out-of-window batches excluded); negative days were clamped to zero and returned only same-day expiry batch.

steps.action: Validate negative stock guard on RawMaterial domain
steps.expected: RawMaterial.setCurrentStock throws ApplicationException when input is negative
steps.observed: RawMaterialStockConstraintTest passed: setCurrentStock(-0.01) threw ApplicationException with ErrorCode.BUSINESS_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION and message 'Raw material stock cannot be negative'.

steps.action: Cross-check API surface for expiry monitoring endpoint

evidence.output: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 4, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0 for expiry query + stock guard classes.

frictions.description: Task subagent spawn failed with model alias error (`Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro`).
frictions.resolution: Executed flow validation directly in-session and produced flow report artifact manually.

summary: Validated inventory assertions for code-cleanup using targeted integration/domain tests and endpoint wiring checks: VAL-INV-002 PASS, VAL-INV-003 PASS.
